text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Fuji Kiseki runs into Curren Chan by
chance while she's out.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What a coincidence meeting you here, Curren.
What are you up to?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm here filming a lil' something for
Umastagram! ☆ Everyone's been raving about the
desserts at this place.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You're on Umastagram too, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we do this together, then? Your trainer
can join us too, of course! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, sounds like a plan. I can't wait to try the
food. Everything on the menu looks gorgeous.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yay! ♪ C'mon, let's get a selfie together real
quick!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gooosh... Fuji, you are just too
awesome! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I mean this! Look, you've angled yourself
perfectly to the light and your smile is spot-on!
You've even flawlessly matched your energy to
mine!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, you don't call yourself @DREAM_MAKER
for nothing! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Don't think I don't notice and appreciate
the comments you leave on my posts, @Curren.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's Umastagram account,
@DREAM_MAKER, is filled with carefully curated
pictures that look like they're straight out of a
whimsical fairy tale.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I secretly follow her, so I know exactly why her
account is so wildly popular—her photos really
seem to draw one into a land of dreams.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
By the way, why don't you have an account on
Umatter yet?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure your fans would love to see the "real" you
in a more casual, day-to-day setting! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I suppose...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Do you wish to see who I am? Strip me of my
costumes and masks, wrench me from the stage,
and there I shall be, the truest form of myself."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"But I cannot bare myself to you. Nay, I mustn't!
My true self must be hidden, lest its cloying
sweetness forever trap you in a waking dream."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"And if such tragedy were to occur... My love, I
would never be able to bring myself to set you
free..."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Flash!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow... That was a good shot.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That was really dramatic... But don't you think
you were laying it on a bit thick?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I always give what my audience wants, but I would
never choose to destroy the illusion and wake
them from their dream.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That is one thing I'll never do, no matter how
much they want it. I have my pride as an
entertainer, after all.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Fuji...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Besides, Umatter is such a casual platform, I'm
afraid I'll accidentally break character while
posting on it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm but an inexperienced student, and I must take
care not to get carried away and ruin my image!
Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... If you say so. But you've given me some
food for thought! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way back, Fuji Kiseki starts some small
talk with me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: By the way, do you use social media?
choice_data_list:
Well, I have a blog I use to keep a record of
things...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: So you do use it! Could it be you also follow me on Umastagram?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Really? I had no idea!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: What interesting information indeed! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I forget all about our conversation, but a few
days later...

text_block_list.name: @Dreamer4385
text_block_list.text: OMG! I literally CAN'T with Fuji's post today!

text_block_list.name: @PrisonerSheep21
text_block_list.text: Nooo! I want to hold her hand!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki has posted an absolutely breathtaking
photo that seems to scream, "Come, take my
hand." The stats on the picture are downright
scary.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you run a blog? What are you keeping a
record of?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her how I collate all the things I've learned
and noticed, and use it as a kind of record book.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Would it be all right if I looked through it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My blog isn't the most exciting thing in the world,
so I'm a bit embarrassed to show her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Wow... I had no idea you were so...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Nothing, never mind. I just feel even more
motivated to live up to your expectations now,
that's all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Right! Let's hurry back so we can rest up for
tomorrow's training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She lets out a clear, ringing laugh, and we
continue heading home.
